messages.text: Is there any way to increase my contact limit i have been at 350 since the first day my node has been up
@[Burlingame] I tried MT for like 5 minutes before switching. Tons of nodes, but ineffective communication. Never looked back.
@[N6TOR] I see 3 hops to NE SJ via. 9c,10,f9. Try the #test channel for more information and quicker response.
@[CWI4] heвҖҷs got a barnacle on him somewhere
@[CWI4] a lot of fun! Only downside was thereвҖҷs way too many people for this event space. Needs to have a larger venue
Good morning everyone, have a great day рҹҷӮ
@[вӣ‘пёҸCarmesh Sandiego] lots of people...means you got lots of contacts and comrades. Always seems like you learn as much from them also
Hope you got or get to see our bay area also!
@[CWI4] true! And I did and excited to come back again next year (hopefully it will be much cooler)
Good morning everyone, enjoy your morning brew вҳ•пёҸрҹҳҒ
@[вӣ‘пёҸCarmesh Sandiego] has to be cooler...take care
@[CWI4] from holding the sander above my head for 4 hrs? A little sore but not bad. рҹ–ҢпёҸ Painting day today!
Finally got my android device to talk to my headlights! I may have left a rude message last night to the company. 6am tech called me.
@[вӣ‘пёҸCarmesh Sandiego] hopefully next time you might visit the Monterey Bay???
Traveling next week. TSA lines are going to be brutal
If you fly out of SFO, apparently not an issue. SFO pays their TSA agents directly, not the government
Not sure about SJC or OAK

@[GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“] painting...yahoo...enjoy the finish. 
Need champagne for the morning launch?
@[CWI4] not sure a new coat of antifouling justifies champagne рҹҚҫ

@[GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“] рҹҳҒ...well I could drink it as I watch it put in the water. 
Celebrate
Does anyone know how to set up a T1000E as an actual tracker in MC so that it can update and I can see it's location?
@[Volna] did you enable position in position settings and then allow telemetry with pos in telemetry settings.
Then you theoretically should be able to request it's position from another node.
@[gogobonobo рҹҷҲ] Mesh on! Have a good trip рҹ‘Ӣ
@[EWOK V4] you can always use your ewoky talky!
@[Squid рҹҰ‘] do you go back and forth to UCSB?
oh, do i need to change my name? there's a different squid isn't there
@[Squid рҹҰ‘] Testy channel testy today рҹ‘Ӣ
@[6B975BBD] Catchy node name. I just flashed 1.14.1--all good so far.
Time to see if the Dublin repeater works for me. Heading up to the Dublin Distance Fiesta.
@[BigByteрҹҚҸ] nice, that's a great location for a repeater should give nice coverage of that area
So I learned something - MC saves path when doing remote telemetry or logging into rooms. And only uses that path after.
Have to reset path manually every time I have to access remote telemetry on a companion or access a room. Pretty annoying.
@[caora gorm] yes definitely need to test it out!
Watching this live website. Pretty crazy
Worth going on roof to go 1.14 to 1.14.1?
Speaker icon next to Heat and Ghosts checkboxes
I want a special wav file to play when it hits my repeater
Just made the switch from that other mesh ;)
Nice that it lets you see if you get out
I am still double dipping on MT. MC is way cooler though.
Seems like I always missed or people didn't see my messages on MT
MT is tough for me, only about 50% of my messages make it to everyone
sometimes i'm just talking to myself on there
My MT tx/rx pretty good, but needs new features
@[caora gorm] i'm on the west side of SF, and I need a 1W yagi just to reach some nodes that can forward me
@[Volna] If the gateways connecting SFbay to PNW were made smarter to limit traffic, and more discreet, it could still cause problems.
Why did the hammer go to therapy? It had a screw loose.
I just finished a 3000 piece Beatles puzzle in 85 degree heat while drinking a glass of red wine.
@[CWI4] bought it for my wife. She couldnвҖҷt finish it.
@[CWI4] seems like рҹҗҗ didn't catch it. I got is direct from 55 and 1000
@[CWI4] two рҹҗӢ came up once and set-off my depth alarm. It is set to 10 feet. I draw 6. Scared the crap out of me.
@[GWQ|рҹҚ“] wow that close. Did not collide
@[CWI4] when I get back I will upgrade рҹҗӢ and рҹҗҰ.
@[GWQ|рҹҚ“] started inside , ended up outside at Midnight . Slept like a baby
@[GWQ|рҹҚ“] how many people cross the bay as much as you do??
Pretty OG to be doing that. Did an evening / night voyage from moss landing to sf for a boat delivery
@[рҹҢҠ SURF WB] not sure. I have a lot of friends in the Santa Cruz harbor but the boat lives in Monterey.
@[рҹҢҠ SURF WB] my worst was off Big Sur. Sustained 40knot winds, huge seas 2 am, engine died.
@[рҹҢҠ SURF WB] will be taking her up to SF in a couple weeks. Do some more Warsailing!!!
Wow. I have left a lot of messages on public for people to wake up to. Sorry! Backing out...
Good morning everyone, have a wonderful weekend and enjoy your brew вҳ•пёҸ
@[GWQ|рҹҚ“] Watch out for the pumpkin patch out whatever itвҖҷs called
@[SJNCERT D3 FIELD UNIT 1 вңіпёҸ] it will be...you as well!
@[рҹҢҠ SURF WB] рҹҘ” can get nasty!
El Cerrito can you hear me??
Pretty wild that shell ridge in WC is hitting Mt Tam, directly? HowвҖҷs that possible
It seems I can send ok , but donвҖҷt receive here in Dublin рҹҳ”
Going out to protest SJUSD maybe IвҖҷll see some of you out there рҹ«Ў
@[KrtG2] it is usually the other way around.
Good morning! It will be a wonderful day!
@[Somebody] ya IвҖҷve been busy the last few days. The east peak repeaters need to be repositioned but theyвҖҷre fine for now.
Would be nice to link to Santa Rosa to the bay. Hmm, but Petaluma would need to join first it seems.
@[KC6ZKT Desk] whoa!!! Really? This is my first time an outbound message went beyond my little neck of the woods (Mill Valley)
@[Chrono_Const] do you have a LOS w AlderslyвҖҷs roof top? If so, I  may be able 2talk 2 some1 thereNsee if theyвҖҷre interested onhosting
рҹ‘Ӣ donвҖҷt see you in my contacts list
IвҖҷll keep that in mind, Sonoma linkage. I know a couple there.
I need more hits so my rooftop node will light up on that analyzer map рҹҳҶ
@[Somebody] try DMing me. I canвҖҷt seem to get through to you.
@[K6BBY] yes, I believe @[KpaPocket] is building it.
@[DRO-DevV4] hi hi to you as well рҹҳҒ
@[Somebody] indeed I am find me on the Bay Area discord
Blorko, youвҖҷve got the best name
@[GWQ Blue Eagle рҹҰ…] IвҖҷm want to be able to real time track you hereвҖҰ..
@[K6BBY] AI made app for detect and track mobile nodes
It's the PG coastline that does it.
@[Scriptkitty Village] what's going on with Meshtastic?
@[bhaggs рҹ”‘ L1] lately, I've see a lot of people come over from Mt and the mesh got new repeaters
tell him to stop looking at Taylor Smith news
@[DRUM&BASE] you must be in South city. One hop to me
I guess HawaiвҖҷi is straight up getting wrecked right now ??
@[рҹҢҠ SURF WB] I'm nervous to look at the news.
@[GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“]  yep most of my messages go through 1000 рҹ’Ҙ repeater.
@[рҹҢҠ SURF WB] potential of 12 inches of rainfall in Maui? That's insane. Imagine a foot of rain covering the Bay Area.
@[Dro рҹҚ» v4] DRO reppin. Look out for a purple Miata.
@[DRUM&BASE] your purp miata is pretty close to my repeater!
@[Dro рҹҚ» v4] yep my buddy sent a map screenshot and I saw you on it. Within miles.
Yup. Just watching packets of data sloshing around рҹҳҺ
One wonders if aimless stumbling packets are a thing
No, itвҖҷs more like they are flung
Lightspeed, packets.  May your photons reach their destination
Good night.  Think of th tree рҹҢі nodes that stay up all night in secret for you
CWI4: @[ESP1 Gilroy Home] sorry if I was  bragging from Watsonville

GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“: Daughter drops her car off to go on vacation..... I wash it.
Son drops my jeep off dirty..... I wash it
KN6NCG EE: @[GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“] I'll be right over, since you have the bucket out.
BigByteрҹҚҸ: @[GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“] at least you donвҖҷt have to sand and paint them.
CWI4: @[N6NU] @[ESP1 Gilroy Home] loving the weather today...why we pay the big bucks
KpaBap: Who up beeping their boops
GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“: Love everything about my Jeep... Except the 17 mpg
GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“: On a scale of 1 to 10, 10 being perfectly aerodynamic, the Jeep is a 0
GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“: @[KpaBap] if I knew what that was I might be
GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“: If anyone does any off-roading, finally found a really good air compressor. Desert tested. If interested let me know.
KpaBap: @[GWQвҲҶрҹҚ“] itвҖҷs like cranking ur hog but with beeps
